# Finances Overview

## Accounts
- **Checking account**: main bank
- **Savings account**: emergency fund (~6 months expenses)
- **Investment account**: ETF savings plan

## Monthly Budget (rough)
- Rent: fixed
- Utilities: variable
- Groceries: budgeted
- Kids (school, hobbies): budgeted
- Transport: budgeted
- Leisure: budgeted
- Savings: target 15% of income

## Recurring Payments
- Streaming services
- Gym membership
- Insurance (annual)
- Professional memberships

## Goals
- Emergency fund: ✓ done
- Vacation fund: build up by June 2026
- ETF: continue monthly contributions into index funds
- Kids education fund: monthly contributions

## Tax
- Do taxes in spring
- Keep receipts for: home office, work equipment, professional development
